AllowedUser.title: Allowed User
AllowedUser.description: A user that is allowed to access the PhysiCore system.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

hasTested.description: Whether the user has tested the system.

invitedBy.description: The email of the user who invited them.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

/allowed_users/{userId}.description: Collection of users permitted to access the dashboard.
